initial.subject: Facturino for :company?
initial.intro: Facturino is a cloud invoicing and accounting platform designed for Macedonian businesses.
initial.benefit: With e-faktura integration and automatic bank feeds, it automates every part of your financial workflow.

followup1.subject: Following up: Facturino
followup1.reference: I reached out a few days ago about Facturino.
followup1.metric: Over 200 Macedonian companies already use Facturino to automate their invoicing.

followup2.subject: Last note: free trial
followup2.busy: I understand you are busy - just a quick note.
followup2.offer: If you would like to try Facturino, we are offering an extended 30-day free trial.
followup2.last_email: This is the last email from us. We will not contact you again.

followup3.subject: 14 days free — no credit card
followup3.trial_offer: We are offering a 14-day free trial of the Standard plan — no credit card, no commitment.
followup3.features: With the Standard plan you get: e-Faktura for UJP, bank connections (NLB, Stopanska, Komercijalna, Sparkasse), automatic VAT calculations, and up to 200 invoices per month.
followup3.pricing: After the trial, the Starter plan is just €12/month and Standard is €29/month. The most affordable solution for Macedonian businesses.
followup3.no_card: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

followup4.subject: Final message: e-Faktura is becoming mandatory
followup4.urgency: E-Faktura is becoming mandatory in Macedonia soon. Facturino is the only platform with automatic UBL 2.1 XML generation and QES digital signing — you are ready with one click.
followup4.partner_offer: If you are an accounting bureau, we offer 20% monthly commission for every client + free access to all features. Over 50 bureaus are already partners.
followup4.final_note: This is truly our last message. We wish you success! If you ever need us — facturino.mk

partner_invite.subject: Welcome to Facturino Partner Program
partner_invite.congrats: Congratulations! You have been accepted into the Facturino Partner Program.
partner_invite.benefits: As a partner, you can manage clients, track commissions, and use exclusive accounting tools.
partner_invite.contact: For questions, contact us at partners@facturino.mk

company_initial.subject: Is your company ready for e-Faktura?
company_initial.pain_point: E-Faktura is becoming mandatory soon. If you are still using Excel or outdated invoicing software — it is time for a change.
company_initial.solution: Facturino is a cloud invoicing platform built for Macedonia: Macedonian VAT rates, automatic e-Faktura (UBL 2.1), bank connections with NLB/Stopanska/Komercijalna/Sparkasse, and MPIN payroll.

company_followup1.subject: Automatic bank statements — no copy-paste
company_followup1.bank_intro: Imagine not having to manually enter bank statements. Facturino automatically pulls transactions and reconciles them with invoices.
company_followup1.banks_list: Direct PSD2 connection: NLB, Stopanska, Komercijalna, Sparkasse. For other banks — CSV import in 30 seconds.

company_followup2.subject: Starter plan: only €12/month
company_followup2.trial_offer: 14 days free Standard plan — no credit card, no commitment. After the trial, decide for yourself.
company_followup2.pricing: Starter: €12/mo (50 invoices) | Standard: €29/mo (200 invoices + e-Faktura + bank) | Business: €59/mo (payroll + API + 1000 invoices)

company_followup3.subject: E-Faktura is becoming mandatory — get ready
company_followup3.efaktura_urgency: When e-Faktura becomes mandatory, you will not have time to prepare. Facturino generates UBL 2.1 XML with QES digital signing — with one click.
company_followup3.ready: Over 200 companies already invoice through Facturino. Recurring invoices, estimates, credit notes, VAT calculations — all automatic.

company_followup4.subject: Final message from Facturino
company_followup4.last_chance: This is our last message. If Excel or your current software works for you — no problem.
company_followup4.comparison: But if you want: automatic e-Faktura, bank feeds, professional PDFs with QR codes, recurring invoices and mobile access — Facturino is here for you.
company_followup4.final_note: We wish you success! If you ever need us — facturino.mk

directory.subject: Facturino — new Macedonian software for :directory
directory.intro: I am writing from Facturino DOOEL Veles. We noticed that :directory is an excellent resource for Macedonian businesses and accountants.
directory.description: Facturino is a new cloud invoicing and accounting platform designed specifically for the Macedonian market. We would love to be included in your directory/listing.
directory.feature_1: E-Faktura for UJP (UBL 2.1 XML + QES signing)
directory.feature_2: PSD2 bank connections (NLB, Stopanska, Komercijalna, Sparkasse)
directory.feature_3: Payroll per Macedonian law (MPIN XML export)
directory.feature_6: Pricing from €12/month — most affordable solution in MK
directory.ask: Would you be able to add Facturino to your directory? We are happy to provide a logo, description, and demo access for review.
directory.closing: Thank you for your time. We are available for collaboration.
